heading: Kia ora koutou
description:
Thank you for taking the time to provide your feedback. This share back reflects what we heard across the movement from our first round of consultation.

This is not a final decision. It’s reflecting back what you told us about the future of club support. You gave us a clear direction. You also raised important questions and concerns, particularly around transition, timing, and what this change would mean in practice for clubs and staff. We have heard those concerns, and we want to acknowledge that there are still many unanswered questions at this stage.

What came through clearly is that your primary concerns are not just about the design of the club support model. They are also about implementation. The project team is now working through those concerns to help define an operating model for support that addresses these.

Once that work is completed, we will come back to you for a second round of consultation with enough operational detail to enable you to share your views on how the model should work in practice.
